description: Recto: State document. Possibly an account synthesizing multiple streams of revenue: capitation tax (māl al-jawālī), a tax on palm produce (māl al-nakhl or maybe the profits of merchants 'māl al-tujjār'), and a tax on the market (māl al-sūq). The name ʿAbdallāh appears at bottom right. Needs examination.
description_he: מסמך ממלכתי בArabic, Greek/Coptic Numerals. מוחזק באוסף מוסרי.
